transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: The block absolves readers and rejects craving-based restraint, yet conditions success on exact compliance while using disgust, severe health outcomes, sweeping causal claims, unverifiable success assertions, and categorical medical promises.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The block absolves readers and rejects craving-based restraint, yet conditions success on exact compliance while using disgust, severe health outcomes, sweeping causal claims, unverifiable success assertions, and categorical medical promises.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Because the blocks are identical, no differential mechanism exists; both try to extinguish desire through categorical reframing, while threat imagery and obedience-contingent certainty undermine epistemic safety and partly reintroduce effort.
